0: SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'
1: SELECT T2.event_status FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.event_id WHERE T1.expense_description = 'Post Cards, Posters' AND T1.expense_date = '2019-08-20'
2: SELECT COUNT(T1.city) FROM zip_code AS T1 INNER JOIN state AS T2 ON T1.state = T2.state WHERE T2.county = 'Orange County' AND T2.state = 'Virginia'
3: SELECT AVG(YEAR(NOW()) - YEAR(birthday)) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'M' AND T2.`T-CHO` >= 250
4: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.power IS NULL OR T1.power = '*' AND T2.language = 'French' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.setCode
5:
SELECT T2.driverRef
FROM qualifying AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE T1.q1 = (SELECT MAX(q1) FROM qualifying WHERE raceId = 20)
  AND T1.raceId = 20;
6:
SELECT T2.State, SUM(T1.Enrollment12) AS TotalEnrollment, SUM(T1.FRPMCount) AS TotalFRPM
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.DOC = 31 AND T1.DistrictType = 'K-12'
GROUP BY T2.State
ORDER BY TotalEnrollment DESC
LIMIT 1;
7:
SELECT T1.County, COUNT(T1.CDSCode) AS NumSchools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Virtual = 'F'
AND T1.County IN ('San Diego', 'Santa Barbara')
GROUP BY T1.County
ORDER BY NumSchools DESC
LIMIT 1;
8: SELECT COUNT(client_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN crime AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.crime_date = '1995-01-01' GROUP BY T1.district_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 2
9: SELECT player_name FROM Player_Attributes WHERE overall_rating = (SELECT MAX(overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes)
10: SELECT T2.Description FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN products AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE SUBSTR(T1.Date, 5, 2) = '09' AND SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
11: SELECT T2.language FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.multiverseid = T2.multiverseid WHERE T1.multiverseid = 149934;
12: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname, MAX(T2.points) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId GROUP BY T2.forename, T2.surname ORDER BY COUNT(T1.wins) DESC LIMIT 1;
13: SELECT event_name FROM event WHERE status = 'Closed' ORDER BY DIVIDE(spent, amount) DESC LIMIT 1
14:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) AS Ratio
FROM customers;
15: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.Location = 'United Kingdom' AND T2.FavoriteCount >= 4
16: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id INNER JOIN votes AS T3 ON T1.Id = T3.PostId WHERE T2.Age > 65 AND T1.Score >= 20
17: SELECT T2.School, T2.AvgScrWrite, T1.Phone FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.OpenDate > '1991-01-01' AND T1.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01'
18: SELECT T1.Diagnosis, T2.Date FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = 30609 ORDER BY T2.Date ASC
19: SELECT T2.aCL_IgM FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Description = '1994-02-19' AND T2.Date = '1993-11-12' AND T1.Diagnosis = 'SLE'
20: SELECT T1.School Name, T1.Street, T1.StreetAbr, T1.City, T1.Zip, T1.State FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` > 30
21: SELECT T2.status FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.type = 'Artifact' AND T1.side IS NULL AND T2.format = 'vintage';
23:
SELECT T2.year, T1.name, T2.date, T2.time
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId
WHERE T1.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)
ORDER BY T2.year ASC;
24: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Karen Beecher-Duncan'
25: SELECT Text FROM comments WHERE Score = 17
26: SELECT Id, Title FROM posts WHERE OwnerDisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' ORDER BY ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1
27: SELECT T2.cost FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.link_to_budget = T2.budget_id WHERE T2.category = 'Posters' AND T1.link_to_event = 'September Speaker'
28: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T1.name = 'Bahrain Grand Prix' AND T2.time IS NOT NULL
29: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Gold' AND T1.publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics')
30: SELECT T3.bond_type, T3.carcinogenicity FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id INNER JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.molecule_id = 'TR010' GROUP BY T3.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(T1.bond_type) = (SELECT MAX(COUNT(bond_type)) FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id INNER JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id)
31: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM cards WHERE isStorylight = 1 AND isTextless = 0
32: SELECT AVG(T1.overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Pietro Marino';
33:
SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT T1.driverid) AS completed_drivers,
    COUNT(T1.driverid) / COUNT(DISTINCT T3.driverid) * 100 AS completion_rate
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T3.date = '1983-07-16'
34: SELECT T1.flavorText FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' AND T2.language = 'Italian';
35: SELECT AVG(milliseconds) FROM results WHERE raceId IN (SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Malaysian Grand Prix') AND driverId IN (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton')
36: SELECT T1.Title, T1.Text FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN tags AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.ExcerptPostId WHERE T2.TagName = '<humor>' GROUP BY T1.Id, T1.Title, T1.Text
37: SELECT element FROM atom JOIN molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR004'
38:
SELECT strftime('%Y', date) AS year, strftime('%Y', date) - strftime('%Y', birthday) AS age
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE sprint_speed >= 97
AND strftime('%Y', date) >= '2013'
AND strftime('%Y', date) <= '2015';
39: SELECT AVG(t2.overall_rating) FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE strftime('%Y', t1.date) >= '2010' AND strftime('%Y', t1.date) <= '2015' AND t2.height > 170;
40: SELECT MAX(points) FROM constructorResults WHERE nationality = 'British'
41: SELECT T1.name, T2.format FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN sets AS T2 ON T1.setCode = T2.code WHERE T2.name = 'Hour of Devastation'
42: SELECT T1.overall_rating FROM Player_Attributes AS T1 INNER JOIN Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T2.player_name = 'Aaron Mooy' AND T1.date LIKE '2016-02-04%'
43:
SELECT COUNT(T2.City) AS Number_of_Cities, COUNT(T1.CDSCode) AS Number_of_Schools
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.Magnet = 1 AND T1.Grade = 'K-8'
GROUP BY T2.City
44: SELECT T2.Consumption FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.ProductID = T2.ProductID WHERE T1.Price / T1.Amount > 29.00 AND T2.Date = '201208'
45: SELECT T2.element, T1.molecule_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+' GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
46: SELECT name FROM races WHERE year = (SELECT min(year) FROM races) AND month = (SELECT min(month) FROM races)
47: SELECT T1.Phone FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.County = 'Fresno Unified' ORDER BY T2.AvgScrRead ASC LIMIT 1
48: SELECT event_name FROM event WHERE cost = (SELECT MIN(cost) FROM expense)
49: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'c' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(atom_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE bond_type = '='
50: SELECT T2.A2 FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T3.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T1.birth_date = '1976-01-29'
51: SELECT T2.publisher_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN attribute AS T2 ON T1.attribute_id = T2.id WHERE T2.attribute_name = 'Speed' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value ASC LIMIT 1
52: SELECT T1.lap, T1.time FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN circuits AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T2.country = 'Italy'
53:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.UpVotes = 0 THEN T2.Id END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) AS percentage
FROM 
    comments AS T1
JOIN 
    users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id
WHERE 
    T1.Score BETWEEN 5 AND 10;
54: SELECT attacking_work_rate FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_name = 'Francesco Migliore' AND date LIKE '2015-05-01%'
55: SELECT CAST(COUNT(Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(Id) FROM votes WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' OR STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011'
56: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.eye_colour_id = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T1.eye_colour_id = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T1.weight_kg = 0 OR T1.weight_kg IS NULL
57: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN T2.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(T2.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event
58:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN preferred_foot = 'left' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(player_fifa_api_id) AS percentage
FROM 
    Player_Attributes
WHERE 
    YEAR(birthday) BETWEEN '1987' AND '1992';
59: SELECT T2.url FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 161 AND T1.lapTime LIKE '0:01:27%'
60: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hydrogen_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count, DIVIDE(hydrogen_count, total_count) AS ratio, CASE WHEN ratio > 0.5 THEN '+' ELSE '-' END AS label FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.molecule_id = 'TR006'
61: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Time FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T2.ChainID = 11
62: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN element = 'f' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT atom_id) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = '+')
63: SELECT T3.surname FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN qualifying AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T2.driverId = T3.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 19 AND T2.q2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.q2 ASC LIMIT 1
64: SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE name = 'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix';
66: SELECT COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'EUR' AND T2.Consumption > 1000
67: SELECT element FROM bond WHERE bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';
68:
SELECT T1.account_id
FROM loan AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T1.duration > 12 AND T2.birth_date = '1993-01-01'
ORDER BY T1.amount DESC
LIMIT 1;
69: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T1.points DESC LIMIT 1
70: SELECT department FROM member WHERE position = 'President'
71: SELECT DIVIDE(COUNT(bond_id), COUNT(atom_id)) FROM atom WHERE element = 'i'
72:
SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') - 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye')
73:
SELECT c.PostId, c.Text, p.ClosedDate
FROM comments c
INNER JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
INNER JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.Id = '23853' AND c.CreationDate = '2013-07-12 09:08:18.0' AND p.ClosedDate IS NULL;
74: SELECT T1.client_id, T1.birth_date - T1.birth_date AS age FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN card AS T3 ON T2.disp_id = T3.disp_id WHERE T3.type = 'gold' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'
75:
SELECT 
    c.name, 
    c.nationality, 
    SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
FROM 
    races r
JOIN 
    constructorResults cr ON r.raceId = cr.raceId
JOIN 
    constructors c ON cr.constructorId = c.constructorId
WHERE 
    r.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND r.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010
GROUP BY 
    cr.constructorId
ORDER BY 
    total_points DESC
LIMIT 1;
76: SELECT T2.bond_type FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id2 WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR004_8' OR T1.atom_id2 = 'TR004_20'

84: SELECT T2.gender FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Phoenix'
85: SELECT T2.translation FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.name = 'Eighth Edition' AND T2.language = 'Chinese Simplified'

87:
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) AS count
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.Sex = 'M'
  AND T2.WBC BETWEEN 3.5 AND 9.0
  AND (T2.FG <= 150 OR T2.FG >= 450)
INTERSECT
SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) AS count
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.Sex = 'M'
  AND T2.WBC BETWEEN 3.5 AND 9.0
  AND T2.FG BETWEEN 150 AND 450;
88:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.SEX) AS Percentage
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    SUBTRACT(year(T1.Birthday), year(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) > 55
GROUP BY 
    T1.SEX;
89:
SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name
FROM member AS T1
JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member
WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maya' AND T1.last_name = 'Mclean' AND T2.event_name = 'Women's Soccer';
91: SELECT SUM(cost) FROM expense WHERE expense_description = 'Pizza'
92:
SELECT T2.Diagnosis
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE CASE 
        WHEN T2.IGM <= 40 THEN 1
        WHEN T2.IGM >= 400 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END = 1
GROUP BY T2.Diagnosis
ORDER BY COUNT(T2.Diagnosis) DESC
LIMIT 1;
93: SELECT T1.category FROM budget AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.link_to_event = T2.event_id WHERE T2.location = 'MU 215' AND T1.spent = 0 AND T2.type = 'Guest Speaker'
94: SELECT event_name FROM event WHERE category = 'Advertisement' ORDER BY spent DESC LIMIT 1
95: SELECT T2.name FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.circuitId = T2.circuitId WHERE T1.country = 'Germany'
96: SELECT AVG(weight_kg) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T2.gender = 'Female'
97: SELECT T2.CharterNum FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrWrite > 499 ORDER BY T1.AvgScrWrite DESC
98: SELECT nationality FROM results WHERE fastestLapSpeed = (SELECT MAX(fastestLapSpeed) FROM results)
99:
SELECT T2.Date, (SUBTRACT(year(T2.`First Date`), year(T1.Birthday))) AS Age
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY T1.`First Date` DESC
LIMIT 1;
